requirement_topic.en: AC Charging Connector Standard (Type 2 / BS EN 62196-2)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电接口标准（Type 2 / BS EN 62196-2）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電接口標準（Type 2 / BS EN 62196-2）

summary.en: UK public AC charging points normally provide an IEC/BS EN 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) socket or tethered connector because Type 2 is the de-facto public AC charging standard in Great Britain, aligned with EU practice under IEC 62196-2. The Public Charge Point Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/1168) cover payment (contactless), reliability, open data, and pricing transparency — they do not mandate a specific connector type. No UK statutory instrument has been identified that explicitly mandates Type 2 as the sole AC connector for all public charge points; the Type 2 dominance reflects market convergence and EU-alignment rather than a direct connector mandate in SI 2023/1168.
summary.zh: 英国公共交流充电桩通常提供IEC/BS EN 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）插座或固定线缆，因为Type 2是英国公共交流充电的事实标准，并与IEC 62196-2下的欧盟惯例一致。英国《2023年公共充电点法规》（SI 2023/1168）涵盖支付（非接触式）、可靠性、开放数据及价格透明度，并未规定具体的接口类型。目前尚未发现明确将Type 2规定为所有公共充电桩唯一交流接口的英国法定文书；Type 2的主导地位反映的是市场趋同与欧盟标准对齐，而非SI 2023/1168中的直接接口强制要求。
summary.zht: 英國公共交流充電樁通常提供IEC/BS EN 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）插座或固定線纜，因為Type 2是英國公共交流充電的事實標準，並與IEC 62196-2下的歐盟慣例一致。英國《2023年公共充電點法規》（SI 2023/1168）涵蓋支付（非接觸式）、可靠性、開放數據及價格透明度，並未規定具體的接口類型。目前尚未發現明確將Type 2規定為所有公共充電樁唯一交流接口的英國法定文書；Type 2的主導地位反映的是市場趨同與歐盟標準對齊，而非SI 2023/1168中的直接接口強制要求。

standards_or_laws: BS EN 62196-2 (Type 2 AC EV connector, UK adoption of IEC 62196-2)
The Public Charge Point Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/1168) — covers payment, reliability, open data and pricing; does not mandate connector type

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC EV charging, defining a physically distinct 7-pin connector that is incompatible with BS EN 62196-2 Type 2. The connector body shape, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ; GB/T plugs cannot mate with UK Type 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国交流电动汽车充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与BS EN 62196-2 Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。两者接口外形、针脚数量和锁定机构均不同；GB/T插头无法与英国Type 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流電動汽車充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與BS EN 62196-2 Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。兩者接口外形、針腳數量和鎖定機構均不同；GB/T插頭無法與英國Type 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Physical hardware incompatibility. A Chinese EV fitted with a GB/T AC inlet cannot charge at UK public Type 2 AC stations. Type 2 is the dominant and effectively universal connector at UK public AC charge points due to market convergence with EU standards; no adapter pathway is recognised for public infrastructure use. The vehicle inlet must be replaced with a Type 2 unit before the EV can access the UK public charging network.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。搭载GB/T交流接口的中国电动汽车无法在英国Type 2公共交流充电站充电。由于与欧盟标准的市场趋同，Type 2是英国公共交流充电站的主流且事实上通用的接口；公共基础设施不认可转接头方案。电动汽车须将接口更换为Type 2型号，方可接入英国公共充电网络。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。搭載GB/T交流接口的中國電動汽車無法在英國Type 2公共交流充電站充電。由於與歐盟標準的市場趨同，Type 2是英國公共交流充電站的主流且事實上通用的接口；公共基礎設施不認可轉接頭方案。電動汽車須將接口更換為Type 2型號，方可接入英國公共充電網絡。

mandatory_status.target: De-facto standard in Great Britain — Type 2 is the dominant AC connector at UK public charge points, aligned with EU/IEC 62196-2 practice. No UK statutory instrument mandating Type 2 as the sole AC connector for all public charge points has been identified: SI 2023/1168 (Public Charge Point Regulations 2023) covers payment, reliability, open data and pricing only; the Automated and Electric Vehicles Act 2018 s.11 enables charge-point provision requirements at motorway services but does not mandate connector type. Type 2 dominance reflects market convergence with EU standards, not a statutory connector mandate.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for AC EV charging in China; no equivalence with BS EN 62196-2

compliance_verdict.en: [Informational] Practical market-access gap. EVs exported from China to the UK normally need a BS EN 62196-2 Type 2 AC inlet to use public charging infrastructure. A GB/T inlet is physically incompatible with UK Type 2 public AC charge points. No recognised adapter pathway exists for public infrastructure use. Note: SI 2023/1168 (Public Charge Point Regulations 2023) covers payment, reliability, and data requirements — not connector type mandates; the Type 2 standard reflects market and EU-alignment rather than a connector mandate in that SI.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】存在实际市场接入差距。从中国出口英国的电动汽车通常需要配备BS EN 62196-2 Type 2交流充电接口，方可使用公共充电设施。GB/T接口与英国Type 2公共交流充电桩物理上不兼容，公共基础设施不认可转接头方案。注意：SI 2023/1168（《2023年公共充电点法规》）涵盖支付、可靠性及数据要求，而非接口类型强制规定；Type 2标准反映的是市场趋同与欧盟对齐，而非该法规中的接口强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】存在實際市場接入差距。從中國出口英國的電動汽車通常需要配備BS EN 62196-2 Type 2交流充電接口，方可使用公共充電設施。GB/T接口與英國Type 2公共交流充電樁物理上不相容，公共基礎設施不認可轉接頭方案。注意：SI 2023/1168（《2023年公共充電點法規》）涵蓋支付、可靠性及數據要求，而非接口類型強制規定；Type 2標準反映的是市場趨同與歐盟對齊，而非該法規中的接口強制要求。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast-Charging Connector Standard (CCS Combo 2 / BS EN 62196-3)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准（CCS Combo 2 / BS EN 62196-3）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準（CCS Combo 2 / BS EN 62196-3）

summary.en: UK public DC rapid charge points normally provide a BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 connector because CCS Combo 2 is the de-facto standard for public DC rapid charging in Great Britain, aligned with EU practice under IEC 62196-3. The Public Charge Point Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/1168) cover payment (contactless), reliability, open data, and pricing transparency — they do not mandate a specific connector type. No UK statutory instrument has been identified that explicitly mandates CCS Combo 2 as the required DC connector for all public rapid charge points; the CCS2 dominance reflects market convergence and EU-alignment rather than a direct connector mandate in SI 2023/1168. No separate OZEV/DESNZ direction mandating CCS2 in primary legislation has been identified.
summary.zh: 英国公共直流快充桩通常提供BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口，因为CCS Combo 2是英国公共直流快充的事实标准，并与IEC 62196-3下的欧盟惯例一致。英国《2023年公共充电点法规》（SI 2023/1168）涵盖支付（非接触式）、可靠性、开放数据及价格透明度，并未规定具体的接口类型。目前尚未发现明确将CCS Combo 2规定为所有公共快充站直流接口的英国法定文书；CCS2的主导地位反映的是市场趋同与欧盟标准对齐，而非SI 2023/1168中的直接接口强制要求。在一级立法中未发现要求公共快充站配备CCS2的独立OZEV/DESNZ指令。
summary.zht: 英國公共直流快充樁通常提供BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口，因為CCS Combo 2是英國公共直流快充的事實標準，並與IEC 62196-3下的歐盟慣例一致。英國《2023年公共充電點法規》（SI 2023/1168）涵蓋支付（非接觸式）、可靠性、開放數據及價格透明度，並未規定具體的接口類型。目前尚未發現明確將CCS Combo 2規定為所有公共快充站直流接口的英國法定文書；CCS2的主導地位反映的是市場趨同與歐盟標準對齊，而非SI 2023/1168中的直接接口強制要求。在一級立法中未發現要求公共快充站配備CCS2的獨立OZEV/DESNZ指令。

standards_or_laws: BS EN 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2 DC EV connector, UK adoption of IEC 62196-3)
The Public Charge Point Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/1168) — covers payment, reliability, open data and pricing; does not mandate connector type

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, connector body, and communication protocol (GB/T 27930 CAN bus vs. ISO 15118 PLC) all differ. GB/T DC plugs cannot mate with CCS Combo 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口。针脚布局、接口外形及通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN总线与ISO 15118 PLC）均不相同。GB/T直流插头无法与CCS Combo 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口。針腳佈局、接口外形及通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN匯流排與ISO 15118 PLC）均不相同。GB/T直流插頭無法與CCS Combo 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Physical hardware incompatibility and communication protocol mismatch. A Chinese EV with a GB/T DC inlet cannot fast-charge at UK CCS Combo 2 stations. CCS Combo 2 is the dominant and effectively universal DC fast-charge connector at UK public rapid chargers due to market convergence with EU standards; no recognised adapter pathway exists for public DC infrastructure. The incompatibility extends beyond the plug shape to the onboard communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 PLC), requiring a redesign of both inlet and charge-control firmware.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容，且通信协议不匹配。搭载GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车无法在英国CCS Combo 2快充站充电。由于与欧盟标准的市场趋同，CCS Combo 2是英国公共快充站的主流且事实上通用的直流接口；公共直流基础设施不认可转接头方案。不兼容性不仅限于插头外形，还涉及车载通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与ISO 15118 PLC），需对接口和充电控制固件进行重新设计。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容，且通訊協定不匹配。搭載GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車無法在英國CCS Combo 2快充站充電。由於與歐盟標準的市場趨同，CCS Combo 2是英國公共快充站的主流且事實上通用的直流接口；公共直流基礎設施不認可轉接頭方案。不相容性不僅限於插頭外形，還涉及車載通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與ISO 15118 PLC），需對接口和充電控制韌體進行重新設計。

mandatory_status.target: De-facto standard in Great Britain — CCS Combo 2 is the dominant DC connector at UK public rapid charge points, aligned with EU/IEC 62196-3 practice. No UK statutory instrument mandating CCS Combo 2 as the sole DC connector for all public rapid charge points has been identified: SI 2023/1168 covers payment, reliability, open data and pricing only; no separate OZEV/DESNZ direction mandating CCS2 has been identified in primary legislation. CCS2 dominance reflects market convergence with EU standards, not a statutory connector mandate.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China; no equivalence with BS EN 62196-3

compliance_verdict.en: [Informational] Practical market-access gap. EVs exported from China to the UK normally need a BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 DC inlet and a compatible ISO 15118 communication stack to access UK public DC rapid-charge infrastructure. A GB/T DC inlet is physically incompatible with CCS Combo 2 stations and no recognised adapter pathway exists for public use. Note: SI 2023/1168 (Public Charge Point Regulations 2023) covers payment, reliability, and data requirements — not connector type mandates; the CCS2 standard reflects market and EU-alignment rather than a connector mandate in that SI.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】存在实际市场接入差距。从中国出口英国的电动汽车通常需要改装BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2直流充电接口及兼容ISO 15118通信协议栈，方可使用英国公共直流快充设施。GB/T直流接口与CCS Combo 2充电站物理上不兼容，且不存在公共使用的认可转接方案。注意：SI 2023/1168（《2023年公共充电点法规》）涵盖支付、可靠性及数据要求，而非接口类型强制规定；CCS2标准反映的是市场趋同与欧盟对齐，而非该法规中的接口强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】存在實際市場接入差距。從中國出口英國的電動汽車通常需要改裝BS EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2直流充電接口及相容ISO 15118通訊協定棧，方可使用英國公共直流快充設施。GB/T直流接口與CCS Combo 2充電站物理上不相容，且不存在公共使用的認可轉接方案。注意：SI 2023/1168（《2023年公共充電點法規》）涵蓋支付、可靠性及數據要求，而非接口類型強制規定；CCS2標準反映的是市場趨同與歐盟對齊，而非該法規中的接口強制要求。
